jobs.title: Factory Digitalization and Automation Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Switzerland as a Digitalization & Automation Engineer and support our factory's digital transformation by designing, developing, and implementing automation, digitalization, and data-driven improvement solutions. How you'll make an impact Analyze manufacturing and business processes to identify automation and digitalization opportunities Design and implement solutions for process automation (industrial or office), digital workflows and paperless processes, as well as production data collection and analysis Collaborate with Operations, IT, Quality, and Continuous Improvement teams to define functional and technical requirements Develop and maintain KPI dashboards (OEE, productivity, quality, downtime) and data acquisition systems (PLC, sensors, MES) Manage technology suppliers and system integrators Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and cybersecurity standards Train end users and support change management activities Your background Master's or bachelor's degree in engineering (Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar) Solid understanding of control logic and process automation, operational process digitalization Experience with MES, ERP, or traceability systems Knowledge of Python, SQL, Power BI \/ Tableau, RPA tools (for example: Power Automate) and industrial IoT solutions Experience with data analysis and reporting tools Experience in manufacturing or industrial environments Technical English (written and spoken) and Italian at least intermediate Familiarity of Lean Six Sigma methodologies and industrial automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) is an advantage More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team di Molinazzo di Monteggio, Svizzera come ingegnere di digitalizzazione e automazione e supporta la trasformazione digitale della nostra fabbrica progettando, sviluppando e implementando soluzioni di automazione, digitalizzazione e miglioramento data-driven. ## Mansioni - Analizza i processi produttivi e aziendali per individuare le opportunità di automazione e digitalizzazione - Progettazione e realizzazione di soluzioni per l'automazione dei processi (industriale o ufficio), flussi di lavoro digitali e processi senza carta, nonché la raccolta e l'analisi dei dati di produzione - Collabora con Operazioni, IT, Qualità e Sistemi di miglioramento continuo per definire requisiti funzionali e tecnici - Sviluppare e mantenere cruscotti KPI (OEE, produttività, downtime) e sistemi di acquisizione dati.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Join our team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Switzerland as a Digitalization & Automation Engineer and support our factory's digital transformation by designing, developing, and implementing automation, digitalization, and data-driven improvement solutions. ## Mansioni - Analyze manufacturing and business processes to identify automation and digitalization opportunities - Design and implement solutions for process automation (industrial or office), digital workflows and paperless processes, as well as production data collection and analysis - Collaborate with Operations, IT, Quality, and Continuous Improvement teams to define functional and technical requirements - Develop and maintain KPI dashboards (OEE, productivity, quality, downtime) and data acquisition systems (PLC, sensors, MES) - Manage technology suppliers and system integrators - Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and cybersecurity standards - Train end users and support change management activities ## Requisiti - Master's or bachelor's degree in engineering (Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar) - Solid understanding of control logic and process automation, operational process digitalization - Experience with MES, ERP, or traceability systems - Knowledge of Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, RPA tools (for example: Power Automate) and industrial IoT solutions - Experience with data analysis and reporting tools - Experience in manufacturing or industrial environments - Technical English (written and spoken) and Italian at least intermediate - Familiarity of Lean Six Sigma methodologies and industrial automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) is an advantage ## Cosa offriamo - More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Mit unserem Team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Schweiz als Digitalisierungs- und Automatisierungsingenieur, unterstützen wir die digitale Transformation unserer Fabrik durch die Entwicklung, Entwicklung und Implementierung von Automatisierungs-, Digitalisierungs- und datengetriebenen Verbesserungslösungen. Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité Rejoignez notre équipe à Molinazzo di Monteggio, Suisse en tant qu'ingénieur en Digitalisation & Automation et soutenez la transformation numérique de notre usine en concevant, développant et implémentant des solutions d'automatisation, de numérisation et d'amélioration des données. ## Mansioni - Analyser les processus de fabrication et d'affaires pour identifier les possibilités d'automatisation et de numérisation - Concevoir et mettre en oeuvre des solutions pour l'automatisation des processus (industrielle ou de bureau), les flux de travail numériques et les processus sans papier, ainsi que la collecte et l'analyse des données de production - Collaborer avec les équipes d'exploitation, d'informatique, de qualité et d'amélioration continue pour définir les exigences fonctionnelles et techniques - Élaborer et maintenir des tableaux de bord KPI (OEE, productivité, qualité, temps d'arrêt) et des systèmes d'acquisition de données (PLC, capteurs, MES) - Gérer les fournisseurs de technologie et les intégrateurs de systèmes - Assurer le respect des normes de sécurité, de qualité et de cybersécurité - Former les utilisateurs finaux et soutenir les activités de gestion du changement ## Requisiti - Maîtrise ou baccalauréat en ingénierie (Automation, Mécatronique, Informatique, Électronique ou similaire) - Compréhension solide de la logique de contrôle et de l'automatisation des processus, numérisation opérationnelle - Expérience avec les systèmes MES, ERP ou traçabilité - Connaissance des systèmes Python, SQL.

jobs.title: Technical Project Manager 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. How you'll make an impact Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs Identifying\/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables Your background Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure Team-player able to build and motivate a project team More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Siamo alla ricerca di un Project Manager per rafforzare il nostro Team nel nostro Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In questo ruolo si sta conducendo l'esecuzione di progetti di medie dimensioni principalmente relativi a trasformatori e reattori LV & MV e garantire che tutte le attività correlate siano svolte in conformità con la politica di Hitachi Energy, standard di qualità, requisiti di salute e sicurezza e ambiente. Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere. Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese. ## Mansioni - Sviluppare programmi di progetto e determinare i requisiti delle risorse - Monitoraggio e reporting sullo stato dei progetti tra cui costi, tempi e personale - Garantire l'aderenza agli standard di qualità interni ed esterni (ad esempio, International Standards Organization) - Gestire i progetti After-Sales assicurando il soddisfacimento delle esigenze del cliente - Identificare/risolvere ostacoli al completamento del progetto sul tempo e sul budget - maggio includono la gestione di progetti di trasformazione aziendale multipli e intercorrelati Su alcuni progetti, il lavoro può includere l'integrazione dei compiti del fornitore nel piano di progetto e il monitoraggio e la revisione dei fornitori consegnabili ## Requisiti - Ingegneria elettrica o ingegneria meccanica Background - 2-3 anni comprovata esperienza in Project Management con focus su Transformers e Reactors - Collaborazione con il diverso numero di stakeholder - Molto buona conoscenza dell'inglese e dell'italiano; qualsiasi altra lingua è un plus - Forte comunicatore, auto-driven e open-minded - Strutturato e organizzato a persona ## Contatto Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. ## Mansioni - Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements - Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing - Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) - Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs - Identifying/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget - May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) - On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables ## Requisiti - Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background - 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors - Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders - Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus - Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded - Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure - Team-player able to build and motivate a project team ## Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. ## Contatto Please submit your resume in English.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Wir suchen einen Projektmanager, um unser Team in unserem Business Unit Transformers, Ticino, zu stärken. In dieser Rolle führen Sie die Durchführung von mittelständischen Projekten vor allem im Zusammenhang mit LV & MV Transformers und Reactors und stellen sicher, dass alle damit verbundenen Aktivitäten in Übereinstimmung mit Hitachi Energiepolitik, Qualitätsstandards, Gesundheit und Sicherheit und Umweltanforderungen durchgeführt werden. Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können. Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein. Mansioni - Entwicklung von Projektplänen und Bestimmung von Ressourcenanforderungen - Überwachung und Berichterstattung über den Status von Projekten einschließlich Kosten, Zeit und Personal - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung interner und externer Qualitätsstandards (z.B. International Standards Organization) - Verwalten von After-Sales-Projekten durch die Sicherstellung der Erfüllung von Kundenbedürfnissen - Identifikation/Resolvieren von Hindernissen für das Projekt zur Zeit und zum Budget - Mai umfassen die Arbeit mit mehreren geschäftsbezogenen Projekten Bei einigen Projekten kann die Arbeit die Integration von Lieferantenaufgaben in den Projektplan und das Tracking und die Überprüfung von Lieferanten liefern. Requisiti - Elektrotechnik oder Maschinenbau Hintergrund - 2-3 Jahre bewährte Erfahrung im Projektmanagement mit Fokus auf Transformers und Reactors - Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Interessengruppen - Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Englisch und Italienisch wachsen; alle anderen Sprachen sind ein Plus - Starker Kommunikationspartner, selbstfahrende und offen-gesinnte Mitarbeiter Â Contatto Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Nous sommes à la recherche d'un gestionnaire de projet pour renforcer notre équipe dans notre unité de transformation, Tessin. Dans ce rôle, vous dirigez l'exécution de projets de taille moyenne principalement liés à LV & MV Transformateurs et Réacteurs et vous assurez que toutes les activités connexes sont réalisées conformément à la politique Hitachi Energy, aux normes de qualité, à la santé et à la sécurité et aux exigences environnementales. Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. Veuillez soumettre votre curriculum vitae en anglais. ## Mansioni - Élaborer des calendriers de projets et déterminer les besoins en ressources - Suivi et établissement de rapports sur l'état d'avancement des projets, y compris les coûts, le calendrier et la dotation - Assurer le respect des normes de qualité internes et externes (p. ex., l'Organisation internationale de normalisation) - Gérer les projets après-vente en assurant la satisfaction des besoins des clients - Identifier et résoudre les obstacles à l'achèvement du projet dans les délais et le budget - Peut comprendre la gestion de projets multiples et interdépendants (y compris les projets de transformation des activités) - Sur certains projets, le travail peut inclure l'intégration des tâches des fournisseurs dans le plan du projet et le suivi et l'examen des produits livrables des fournisseurs ## Requisiti - Génie électrique ou génie mécanique Contexte - 2-3 ans d'expérience prouvée en gestion de projet avec l'accent sur les transformateurs et les réacteurs - Collaboration avec divers intervenants - Très bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'italien; toute autre langue est un plus - Communicateur fort, autonome et ouvert - Personne structurée et organisée ayant la capacité de travailler sous pression temporelle - Joueur d'équipe capable de construire et de motiver une équipe de projet ## Cosa offriamo - Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. ## Contatto Veuillez soumettre votre CV en anglais.

jobs.title: Electrical Engineer – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team to drive the implementation of the latest internal and external standards in our Dry Transformers across all the factories in HUB Europe. This role offers you an exciting opportunity to broaden your expertise across various disciplines and functions, engage in dynamic projects and build a strong professional network both within and outside our organization. How you'll make an impact Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality. You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders Your background Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred) About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work L6S green belt is preferred Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Electrical Ingegnere – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)

jobs.title: Electrical Design Engineer - Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. How you'll make an impact Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency Your background Degree in electrical engineering or a related field 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team English is a must, Italian is beneficial Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. How you'll make an impact Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency Your background Degree in electrical engineering or a related field 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team English is a must, Italian is beneficial Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Factory Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist part of the local HSE team, you will play a key role in participating to HSE development, with main focus on Environmental topic, but granting a good support on Health & Safety activities. Key tasks on the Environmental side will be related to safeguarding our site's environmental integrity and driving our sustainability ambitions forward. In this role, you will ensure full compliance with all relevant environmental laws, regulations, and permits, while fostering strong relationships with community stakeholders and environmental authorities. You will develop, implement, and maintain robust environmental policies and procedures that promote accountability across the organization. By conducting environmental risk assessments, delivering training on sustainability practices, and leading initiatives that improve resource efficiency, you will directly contribute to reducing the factory's environmental footprint and supporting long-term operational excellence. On the H&S part, you'll be required to support main Health and Safety development activities organized by the HSE Manager, delivering results according to Management expectations. Please submit your application in English. How you'll make an impact Ensure regulatory compliance with Swiss environmental law and related frameworks (USG\/EPA, LRV\/OAPC, GSchG\/WPA, VVEA, ChemA\/ChemO), including permit management and coordination with cantonal authorities (BAFU) Lead environmental impact assessments for new production lines, plant changes, and modifications, ensuring alignment with internal environmental policies Manage waste and disposals, including segregation, traceability, registers, supplier audits, and all special waste streams, while supporting wastereduction and VVEA improvement initiatives Oversee chemical compliance, including ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, Manage and maintain Safety SDS requirements, and notifications of new substances Support safe handling and storage of dangerous goods (DG) by coordinating with relevant departments and ensuring ongoing compliance Plan and conduct environmental audits and inspections, identifying improvement areas and ensuring timely corrective actions, also providing environmental compliance support and training to Engineering, Maintenance, and overall Business Unit, including REACH\/RoHS documentation and sustainability-related data needs On the Health and Safety part, you're required to support HSE manager in H&S-related topics managing production activities and equipment with the highest safety standards, both on the practical part and on documentation preparation. Support HSE reporting activities required by governmental or Hitachi Energy internal stakeholders. Your background Min. 3 years of experience in environmental roles within the industrial sector and strong knowledge of Swiss environmental regulations and compliance obligations Solid understanding of best practices in emissions, waste, water, chemicals, and sustainability Strong analytical skills, including environmental data processing and use of relevant software tools Basic knowledge of H&S principles and concepts Excellent command of Office 365 applications Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to assess environmental risks and develop effective mitigation strategies Excellent verbal and written communication skills for engaging with diverse internal and external stakeholders Fluent in Italian and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Business Analyst Global Product Group DT
jobs.description: The Opportunity: As a part of Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers team, you will be responsible for business analysis for core digitalization projects including Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA and Matterport within 25 factories in the portfolio scope. You will contribute cross-functionally by collaborating with IT function and business domains, as well as being responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining the GPG DT Power BI reports to monitor KPIs and performance metrics How you'll make an impact Ensure adherence to data governance standards and maintain comprehensive documentation for all reports and processes within GPG DT Operations Digital area. Collect and design business requirements into required documentation format and templates. Identify opportunities to enhance reporting processes, tools, and methodologies for greater efficiency and scalability. Implement best practices and leverage emerging technologies to improve data analytics capabilities. Provide training and guidance to business teams on the analytics reports, core digital tools, TrafoSignature tool. Collaborate with global teams, HUBs, and factories to gather requirements and deliver tailored reporting solutions. Act as a key liaison between technical teams and business stakeholders to ensure alignment and transparency. Lead functional and business analysis for core projects: Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA, Matterport from business perspective. Perform user acceptance tests and validation together with key-users and IT. Provide digital updates on GPG DT website content with the usage of CMS. Your background Degree in Engineering, Data Science, IT or a related technical field. Minimum 5 years of experience in end-to-end data analytics, preferably within manufacturing or industrial environments. Proficiency in Power BI, including advanced DAX functions, Power Query, and report scheduling. Good knowledge of data modeling, visualization, and integration from multiple sources (e.g., SAP, SQL, Azure, Power Automate). Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work with global technical teams and stakeholders. Strong understanding of functional and business analysis. Strong problem-solving abilities, attention to detail, and ability to work independently in a global team environment. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully .* * A pplicable only for Poland location align with local law regulations
